title: Calendar Integrations

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello partners,
Has anyone here tried calendar applications? I would like to ask you some questions about it:
1.- When an element is created (appointment), how do I add the users who are going to attend the appointment?
2.- How do I see the available time of other collaborators?
3.- How do I accept or not an appointment that a user invites me to?
4.- Do I have to use the native Monday integration with Outlook Calendar?

Thank you so much. I am attentive to your response.
